code:
sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Utilisateur participant WC as Web Client participant CN as Core NGINX
:80 participant Voyage as Voyage Service
:3003 participant Payment as Payment Service
:3005 participant AI as AI Service
:3004 participant PG as PostgreSQL
:5432 participant Redis as Redis
:6379 participant Kafka as Kafka
:9092 participant Stripe as 💳 Stripe API rect rgb(CloudNative_DockerImage) Note over User,Voyage: Phase 1: Sélection Vol User->>WC: Sélectionne vol
(CloudNative_DockerImage) WC->>WC: Add to cart
(CloudNative_ServiceMesh) User->>WC: Click "Réserver" WC->>CN: POST /api/v1/bookings
{CloudNative_DockerImage}
Authorization: Bearer JWT CN->>CN: Validate JWT (CloudNative_DockerImage) CN->>Voyage: Forward to Voyage
localhost:3003/bookings end rect rgb(CloudNative_Serverless) Note over Voyage,Kafka: Phase 2: Création Réservation Voyage->>Voyage: Extract userId from JWT Voyage->>PG: BEGIN transaction Note right of PG: 🔄 ACID transaction
pour cohérence Voyage->>PG: INSERT booking
{CloudNative_DockerImage} PG-->>Voyage: Booking created (CloudNative_DockerImage) Voyage->>Redis: Store booking temp
key: "booking:temp:bookingId"
TTL: 15min Note right of Redis: ⏱️ Timeout si paiement
échoue après 15min Voyage->>Kafka: Publish event
Topic: "voyage.booking.created"
{CloudNative_ServiceMesh} Note left of Kafka: Event-Driven Architecture
- Decoupling services
- Async processing
- Audit trail Voyage-->>CN: 201 Created
{CloudNative_K8sCluster} CN-->>WC: 201 Created end rect rgb(CloudNative_Serverless) Note over WC,Stripe: Phase 3: Demande Paiement WC->>CN: POST /api/v1/payments/intent
{CloudNative_HelmChart}
Authorization: Bearer JWT CN->>Payment: Forward to Payment
localhost:3005/payments/intent Payment->>Payment: Extract userId from JWT Payment->>PG: Verify booking exists
SELECT * FROM bookings
WHERE id = bookingId AND userId = userId alt Booking Non Trouvé ❌ PG-->>Payment: null Payment-->>CN: 404 Not Found
{CloudNative_Serverless} CN-->>WC: 404 Error WC->>User: ❌ Erreur réservation else Booking Trouvé ✅ PG-->>Payment: Booking found Payment->>Stripe: Create PaymentIntent
POST /v1/payment_intents
{CloudNative_HelmChart),
currency: "eur",
metadata: {CloudNative_Serverless}} Stripe-->>Payment: PaymentIntent created
{CloudNative_Serverless} Payment->>PG: INSERT payment
{CloudNative_Serverless} Payment->>Kafka: Publish event
Topic: "payment.intent.created"
{CloudNative_DockerImage} Payment-->>CN: 200 OK
{CloudNative_DockerImage} CN-->>WC: 200 OK end end rect rgb(CloudNative_Serverless) Note over WC,Stripe: Phase 4: Paiement Stripe (CloudNative_ServiceMesh) WC->>WC: Initialize Stripe.js
with clientSecret WC->>User: Affiche formulaire carte
(CloudNative_Serverless) User->>WC: Saisit infos carte
(CloudNative_K8sCluster) WC->>Stripe: POST /v1/payment_intents/:id/confirm
(CloudNative_DockerImage)
{CloudNative_DockerImage} Note right of Stripe: 🔒 Sécurité PCI-DSS
- Carte jamais envoyée à notre backend
- Stripe gère tout
- Tokenization automatique alt Paiement Réussi ✅ Stripe-->>WC: PaymentIntent succeeded WC->>WC: Display success message WC->>User: ✅ Paiement accepté else Paiement Échoué ❌ Stripe-->>WC: PaymentIntent failed
(CloudNative_Serverless) WC->>User: ❌ "Paiement refusé"
(CloudNative_K8sCluster) end end rect rgb(CloudNative_ServiceMesh) Note over Stripe,Kafka: Phase 5: Webhook Stripe (CloudNative_HelmChart) Stripe->>Payment: POST /webhooks/stripe
Stripe-Signature header
{CloudNative_Serverless}} Payment->>Payment: Verify signature
stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(CloudNative_HelmChart) alt Signature Invalide ❌ Payment-->>Stripe: 400 Bad Request Note right of Payment: Protection contre
webhooks forgés else Signature Valide ✅ Payment->>PG: UPDATE payment
SET status = "SUCCEEDED"
WHERE stripePaymentIntentId = id Payment->>PG: UPDATE booking
SET status = "CONFIRMED"
WHERE id = bookingId Payment->>Redis: Delete temp booking
DEL "booking:temp:bookingId" Payment->>Kafka: Publish event
Topic: "payment.succeeded"
{CloudNative_Serverless} Payment-->>Stripe: 200 OK end end rect rgb(CloudNative_DockerImage) Note over Kafka,User: Phase 6: Traitement Async (CloudNative_DockerImage) Kafka->>Voyage: Consume event
"payment.succeeded" Voyage->>PG: SELECT booking details Voyage->>Voyage: Generate confirmation email
(CloudNative_HelmChart) Voyage->>User: 📧 Email confirmation
+ PDF billet Kafka->>AI: Consume event
"voyage.booking.created" AI->>PG: Get user profile
+ booking history AI->>AI: Update ML model
(CloudNative_ServiceMesh) Note right of AI: 🤖 AI learning
from user behavior AI->>Redis: Update recommendations
key: "reco:userId" end rect rgb(CloudNative_Serverless) Note over WC,User: Phase 7: Confirmation Frontend loop Polling every 2s WC->>CN: GET /api/v1/bookings/:bookingId CN->>Voyage: Forward request Voyage->>PG: SELECT booking
WHERE id = bookingId alt Status = CONFIRMED ✅ PG-->>Voyage: Booking confirmed Voyage-->>CN: 200 OK
{CloudNative_Serverless} CN-->>WC: 200 OK WC->>WC: Stop polling WC->>WC: Redirect /bookings/:id WC->>User: ✅ Affiche confirmation
+ détails voyage else Status = PENDING ⏳ PG-->>Voyage: Booking still pending Voyage-->>CN: 200 OK
{CloudNative_HelmChart} CN-->>WC: 200 OK (CloudNative_ServiceMesh) Note right of WC: ⏱️ Après 15min
réservation annulée
automatiquement end end end Note over User,Kafka: 📊 Performance Réservation
Create booking: ~100-150ms
Payment intent: ~500-800ms (CloudNative_DockerImage)
Confirmation: ~1-2s (CloudNative_HelmChart)
Email: ~3-5s (CloudNative_Serverless)

🔒 Fiabilité
- Transaction ACID (CloudNative_K8sCluster)
- Idempotency keys (CloudNative_DockerImage)
- Webhook retry (CloudNative_DockerImage)
- Event sourcing (CloudNative_DockerImage)
